title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that the USA faces structural disadvantages in the AI race despite dominance in chips and models, primarily due to fragmented energy grid governance versus China's centralized approach. China's superior power infrastructure, including 25,000+ miles of UHV transmission lines and the Eastern Data Western Compute strategy, enables AI data centers at scale while US hyperscalers resort to behind-the-meter and off-grid workarounds.
